This ruling brings an end to the corporate insolvency resolution process. The developer's operations and projects r

india_trends.title: Manappuram Finance Q4 Results: Firm swings to black with ₹405 crore profit, announces ₹0.50 dividend
india_trends.summary: Manappuram Finance's Q4 consolidated profit came in at ₹404.79 crore as against a loss of ₹203.17 crore in the same period a year ago. Meanwhile, on a quarter-on-quarter (QoQ) basis, the figure rose 69% from ₹238.55 crore in the December quarter.

india_trends.title: Crude oil jumps over 5% as US-Iran tensions flare again; Brent crude climbs past $114
india_trends.summary: Crude oil prices rose on May 4 after a tanker was reportedly hit in the Strait of Hormuz. Tensions escalated between the U.S. and Iran, with Trump promising to guide ships through the strait, while Iran warned of military action against US forces and urged coordination for passing vessels.

india_trends.title: India must map, monitor economic vulnerabilities in energy, food, other areas: EAC-PM chairman
india_trends.summary: Economic Advisory Council to the Prime Minister (EAC-PM) Chairman S Mahendra Dev in an interview with PTI further said the ongoing West Asia conflict highlights the need for a forward-looking approach to risk management.

india_trends.title: Rupee falls 39 paise to end at all-time low of 95.23 against US dollar — What's plaguing the domestic currency?
india_trends.summary: At the interbank foreign exchange market, the rupee opened at 94.95 against the US dollar, then lost ground and finally settled for the day at 95.23 (provisional), registering a fall of 39 paise over its previous close.

india_trends.title: Oil jumps by 5% after report of US warship being hit by missiles
india_trends.summary: Oil prices rose about 5% on Monday after Iran's Fars news agency ​reported an incident with a U.S. ​warship in the Strait of Hormuz, sparking concerns over a prolonged ​disruption in the vital oil transit route.
